spec_match.rationale: The monitor reads styleDuration and layoutDuration from the LoAF entry and forcedStyleDuration/forcedLayoutDuration from entry.scripts[], matching the origin-trial PR.

interactive.rationale: The workload intensity slider plus style, forced-style, layout, and clear controls produce live result cards.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept description now promises monitoring with baseline fallback rather than guaranteed split fields in every browser.

edge_cases.rationale: Unsupported origin-trial fields are clearly labeled and the page still shows combined style/layout and manual fallback measurements.

references.rationale: The page cites the ChromeStatus feature link for 5171478175809536.

design_system.rationale: The repaired page uses shared CSS variables and has no source inline styles, raw hex colors, or inline event handlers.

summary: Open critique items repaired. DevTools MCP verification exercised the workload intensity slider, trigger style work, trigger forced style read, trigger layout work, and clear entries controls at http://localhost:3000/v147/long-animation-frames-style-duration/loaf-style-monitor/?verify=after-loaf-style-fix. Chrome 148 produced result cards for all three workloads, captured LoAF entries, and showed fallback measurements while split origin-trial fields were unavailable. Console and network were clean; conformance now reports 4 baseline PASS and 4 origin-trial FAIL in this browser.
